title: calliandra brevicaulis var. genuina
intro: Calliandra brevicaulis var. genuina is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is commonly known as the 'pink powder puff' or 'powder puff tree' due to its showy, pink flowers that resemble a puffed skirt. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calliandra brevicaulis var. genuina include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by making tea from its leaves and flowers, or by using it in combination with other herbs to create a poultice or topical cream.
